resources.string: Storage will track binders, boxes, deck boxes, and shelves so you can find cards fast once location data is added.
Next implementation slice: add storage locations to collection entries, then surface per-location counts and filters here.
Track your chase list separately from ownership.
Wants will let you bookmark missing cards, desired extra copies, and priority targets without mixing them into owned inventory.
Next implementation slice: create a wanted-card table, then add search, set grouping, and priority controls here.
Decks will bring saved deck lists, required quantities, and ownership checks into the app so collecting and playing live together.
Next implementation slice: add deck and deck-card tables, then introduce deck create/edit flows and ownership summaries here.
Tune the app around your workflow.
Settings will hold display preferences, filters, export/import actions, and later theme or sync options.
Next implementation slice: decide between DataStore or SharedPreferences, then wire a real settings screen here.
